name: Walnut Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease or spray a 9x5x3 inch loaf pan.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Mix and sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and spices in a bowl.
4. Stir in cereal, walnuts, and apple.
5. Combine egg, brown sugar, buttermilk, and oil; add to dry mixture.
6. Stir just enough to moisten the dry ingredients. Do not beat.
7. Spoon batter into the pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for one hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Makes 1 loaf.
